Name: DOF_BANK
Description: Determines the parameters for depth of field assignments.

Fields.Name: Far DOF: Start Distance
Fields.Description: The distance at which distant objects start to become blurred due to depth of field. In metres.

Fields.Name: Far DOF: End Distance
Fields.Description: The distance at which distant objects become completely blurred due to depth of field. In metres.

Fields.Name: Far DOF: Strength
Fields.Description: The strength of the depth of field blur. 0 means no blur.

Fields.Name: Near DOF: Start Distance
Fields.Description: The distance at which distant objects start to become blurred due to depth of field. In metres.

Fields.Name: Near DOF: End Distance
Fields.Description: The distance at which distant objects become completely blurred due to depth of field. In metres.

Fields.Name: Near DOF: Strength
Fields.Description: The strength of the depth of field blur. 0 means no blur.

Fields.Name: Blur Strength
Fields.Description: The base strength of the depth of field blur.
